headline: JetBlue Boosts Its Presence in South Florida With Extended Deal
summary: JBLU extends its Florida Panthers partnership as it expands FLL service, adding JetBlue Landing and a revamped Champions Club role.

headline: Here's Why Investors Should Bet on Expeditors Stock at Present
summary: E-commerce demand is lifting EXPD's intermodal services. while a solid financial position supports acquisitions, dividends and share repurchases.

headline: Strength Seen in DSV (DSDVY): Can Its 5.5% Jump Turn into More Strength?
summary: DSV (DSDVY) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
